sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34867" key="e)nantiw/numos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναντῐ-ώνῠμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34867.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having an opposite name</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
